name: Gently Persuasive Prawns
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon cornmeal (or any other fine meal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the prawns.
2. Melt the butter in a sauté pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add shallots and garlic, and saute for 1 minute.
4. Add the prawns and saute quickly until they turn just pink.
5. Stir in champagne, lemon juice, and cornmeal (or any other fine meal).
6. Simmer for 3 minutes.
7. Serve over a bed of hot rice or pasta.
8. Garnish with fresh chopped parsley.
